question_text: Let 𝑥1 ∈(0, 4) and consider the sequence {𝑥𝑛}𝑛≥1 defined iteratively by 𝑥𝑛+1 = 2 −(4 −𝑥𝑛) 2, 𝑛≥1.

options.C: onsider the following statements: (I) {𝑥𝑛} converges to 0 . (II) 𝑥𝑛+1 𝑥𝑛 } converges to 4 . Which of the following statements is correct?
options.D: Neither statement (I) nor statement (II) is correct
